prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `ac3e2b04`.
codex_response:
Implemented `ac3e2b04` as a new ARC2 task package. Rule summary: each 3x3 green target on a full red frontier projects a blue frontier in the perpendicular direction, and every crossing with a red frontier gets the same 3x3 target motif in blue while existing green targets and red centers stay unchanged. I used the summary hint after checking it against the official examples; no `notes.md` or new DSL primitive was needed.

Validation passed end-to-end: official verification was `5/5`, the shared builder produced 1000 examples, and generated-example verification was `1000/1000`. The generator samples spaced full frontiers, places 1-2 targets on a subset of them, and rotates the canonical construction to cover both horizontal and vertical task families.

Files:
- Task package: [__init__.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_ac3e2b04/__init__.py), [verifier.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_ac3e2b04/verifier.py), [generator.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_ac3e2b04/generator.py)
- Artifacts: [task.json](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/ac3e2b04/task.json), [originals.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/ac3e2b04/previews/originals.png), [preview_01.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/ac3e2b04/previews/preview_01.png), [preview_02.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/ac3e2b04/previews/preview_02.png), [preview_03.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/ac3e2b04/previews/preview_03.png)
